/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PropertyMP3.dir/PropertyMP3_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PropertyMP3.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PropertyMP3.dir/src/MetadataController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PropertyMP3.dir/PropertyMP3_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o PropertyMP3.app/Contents/MacOS/PropertyMP3 -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQuickControls2.framework/Versions/A/QtQuickControls2 /opt/homebrew/lib/libtag.2.3.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQmlMeta.framework/Versions/A/QtQmlMeta /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQmlWorkerScript.framework/Versions/A/QtQmlWorkerScript /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQmlModels.framework/Versions/A/QtQmlModels /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
